title: Stellar
description: Modern "client" for Hypixel & other minigame servers
body:
Attempt at making a drop-in replacement modpack for Lunar client, giving you the tools you need while staying open source! Includes two (free!) cosmetics mods (Cosmetica & Ears), the usual optimization mods you expect (Sodium & friends) and various visual enhancements!

Credits to AxolotlClient for the UI :)
